tasks.title: Add grid-viewport wrapper HTML
tasks.description: Wrap #grid-container in a new #grid-viewport div. Move visual props (border-radius, box-shadow, overflow:hidden) from grid-container to viewport. Add #zoom-indicator badge inside viewport.

tasks.title: CSS for viewport, zoom transform, and indicator
tasks.description: Style #grid-viewport with overflow:hidden, border-radius, box-shadow. Update #grid-container to have transform-origin:0 0, will-change:transform, remove old overflow/radius/shadow. Style #zoom-indicator as floating badge. Update night-mode selectors.

tasks.title: Zoom/pan state and applyZoomTransform()
tasks.description: Add zoomLevel (1), panX (0), panY (0) state vars. Add applyZoomTransform() that sets grid-container transform: translate(panX, panY) scale(zoomLevel). Add enforcePanBounds() to keep grid within viewport. Add updateZoomIndicator() to show/hide zoom badge.

tasks.title: Fix getCellUnder() for zoom
tasks.description: Convert screen coordinates to grid-container local space using viewport rect and zoom/pan values instead of raw getBoundingClientRect math.

tasks.title: Fix animation offset calculations
tasks.description: Replace all (gridRect.left - containerRect.left) patterns with grid.offsetLeft/offsetTop for local-space positioning. Affects: renderTrainAtProgress (2 places), startPlay car pre-seeding, spawnChimneySmoke, puzzle confetti.

tasks.title: Mouse wheel zoom on desktop
tasks.description: Add wheel event listener on grid-viewport. Zoom toward cursor position. Range 0.5x-2.0x. Ctrl+wheel for finer control.

tasks.title: Pinch-to-zoom and two-finger pan on mobile
tasks.description: Track touch events on grid-viewport. Two-finger pinch scales zoomLevel centered on midpoint. Two-finger drag pans. Ensure single-finger still works for drag-and-drop.

tasks.title: Double-tap to reset zoom
tasks.description: Track tap timing on grid area. Two taps within 300ms resets zoom to 1.0 and pan to (0,0).

tasks.title: Keyboard zoom shortcuts
tasks.description: Add +/= for zoom in, - for zoom out, 0 for reset. Update shortcuts overlay.

tasks.title: Reset zoom on resize
tasks.description: In the window resize handler, reset zoom to 1.0 and pan to (0,0) to prevent layout issues.

acceptance_criteria: Pinch-to-zoom works on iPad/iPhone with range 0.5x-2.0x
Mouse wheel zoom works on desktop, zooming toward cursor
Two-finger pan works when zoomed in
Double-tap on grid resets zoom to 1:1
Zoom level indicator appears in corner when zoom != 1x
Grid stays within viewport bounds (can't pan off-screen)
All existing features work at all zoom levels: drag-and-drop, rotation, train animation, particles, sounds
No JS errors at any zoom level
Performance stays smooth (CSS transform is GPU-accelerated)
testing_focus: Cell identification (getCellUnder) accuracy at all zoom levels
Pinch gesture doesn't interfere with single-finger drag
Mobile drawer interaction unaffected by zoom
